questions.question:
A Deployment named `metrics-api` in namespace `identity-lab` is failing because its projected service account token wiring is wrong.

Fix the workload so that:
- it uses ServiceAccount `metrics-sa`
- `automountServiceAccountToken` is `false`
- the projected service account token path is `token`
- the projected token audience is `metrics-api`
- the projected volume is mounted read-only at `/var/run/metrics`
- the Deployment becomes Available
- the running container can read `/var/run/metrics/token`

Do not remove the projected token volume. Fix the Deployment identity wiring.

verification.description: Deployment metrics-api uses the intended ServiceAccount and projected token settings
Deployment metrics-api becomes Available after the identity wiring is repaired
The running container reads the projected service account token at /var/run/metrics/token
